case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. O'CONNOR, SANDRA ANN

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT O'CONNOR, SANDRA ANN
